dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent on trend direction. Entry conditions for uptrend: price moves above S1 or between pivot and S1. Entry conditions for downtrend: open above pivot, above CPR (approximated as pivot), or between CPR and R1. Exit for uptrend targets R1/R2 or higher; exit for downtrend is reversal below pivot. CPR (Central Pivot Range) is approximated using pivot level. Author provided minimal exit guidance (AUTHOR_SILENT), so exit conditions use reasonable reversal logic.

source_rule_text: In an uptrend, look for long entries when price moves up from S1 or between the central pivot and S1, targeting R1 and R2 or higher; in a downtrend, look for short entries when stock opens above the pivot, above the CPR, or between the CPR and R1.
